ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the employee works */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "years_served" TEXT /* Length of time the employee has served */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current job title */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the job title belongs */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "job_title_level" TEXT /* Level of the job title */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job title record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job title record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_history" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee ended the job */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluation_rating" REAL /* Rating of the employee's performance */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the employee data */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being notified */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
